Weekly Team Pulse

Who's active, who's moving conversations, and who might be slipping — built from logged activity and call dispositions.

Loading window…
Window
⚠︎ What this is, honestly: these are logged activity counts and call dispositions over the window — a proxy for effort and conversation outcomes, not pipeline value, conversion rate, or revenue. "Moving deals" here means logged meetings/interest; "slipping" is inferred from a high not-interested/lost or can't-reach share, or a rep who's gone quiet. Treat it as a list of who to talk to, not a scorecard. The tool can't tell you which rep touched which lead.

Moving conversations

Most logged meetings / validated interest this window.

    Might be slipping — coach

    Active, but a high share of outcomes are lost / can't-reach. Effort without traction.

      Gone quiet

      Little or no logged activity in the window. Check in.

        Team activity trend

        —

        Per-rep detail

        Click a column to sort
        Rep Activity Meet/Int Chasing No-reach Lost Win-share Outcome mix
        Meetings / interest Still chasing Couldn't reach Lost
        Data via leadbay_team_activity · activity + call-disposition counts only.
        No conversion rate, deal value, time-in-stage, or per-lead rep attribution is available from this tool.
